content:
- Completed the docs rewrite task end to end.
- Verification passed cleanly: make check, make test, make test-long, make lint, and an extra make docs-build sanity pass for the mdBook after the docs-heavy change.
- Updated the task file to status done and passes true, then ran .ralph/task_switch.sh successfully so Ralph moved the task to done tracking and sent the completion email.
- Next I am staging every changed file including .ralph, committing with the required task finished message and test evidence, and pushing.
